title: Arcana Novum
body:
![Arcana Novum](https://github.com/borisshoes/ArcanaNovum/blob/main/non-mod-resources/ArcanaNovum_Banner.png?raw=true) # Minecraft's biggest Server-Only full-feature Magic Mod! ### From powerful items and blocks, to multiblock structures, to custom bosses, Arcana has it all! [![Arcana Novum](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&query=title&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/9J7sCd3t&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcana-novum) [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/9J7sCd3t&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcana-novum) [![Followers](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20followers&query=followers&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/9J7sCd3t&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcana-novum) [![Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=Available%20for&color=4bab62&query=version&url=https://api.blueish.dev/api/minecraft/version?id=9J7sCd3t)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcana-novum)
![Server, Optional Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server%2c%20opt%20client-c65135?style=flat-square) This mod only needs to be installed on a server.
[![](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/https://discord.gg/dTKPeNEg6r)](https://discord.gg/dTKPeNEg6r) Join Our Discord Server! | 3.0 Spotlight / Tutorial | Arcana 3.1 Spotlight | Version 4.0 Spotlight | |:---:|:---:|:---:| | [![Mod Tutorial](https://img.youtube.com/vi/JU-iLKURhzw/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JU-iLKURhzw) | [![3.1 Changes Showcase](https://img.youtube.com/vi/z-8MGpFFSkQ/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z-8MGpFFSkQ) | Coming Soon! ![4.0 Spotlight](https://github.com/borisshoes/ArcanaNovum/blob/main/non-mod-resources/ArcanaNovum_Banner.png?raw=true) | ## Texture Pack The server has the ability to automatically generate and serve the mod's texture pack to your players when they connect. To do this, you must enable auto-host. This is super easy to do in a few steps: 1. Launch the server with the mod installed at least once to generate the configs 2. Go into the 'config' folder of the server, there should be a folder called 'polymer', and inside that there should be a file called 'auto-host.json' 3. In 'auto-host.json', in the first few lines there will be a line that says `"enabled": false`, change this to true. 4. (Optional) You can also set the value to make the resource pack required by players, or set the "message" line to inform players why the resource pack is important to download when they are prompted to have it be auto downloaded. If everything is done correctly, then players will automatically load into the server with the resource pack installed. ## Commands ### Player Commands * ```/arcana version``` Shows the current Arcana Novum mod version. * ```/arcana help``` Opens the Arcana Guide Book GUI. * ```/arcana guide``` Opens the Arcana Guide Book GUI (alias for help). * ```/arcana items``` Shows your current Arcane Concentration usage and a breakdown of items taking concentration. * ```/arcana show``` Shows off the Arcana Item in your main hand to all players on the server. * ```/arcana blocks``` Lists all of your placed Arcana Blocks, including their location and dimension. ### Admin Commands * ```/arcana create []``` Creates an Arcana Item by its ID and gives it to yourself, or to the specified target players. * ```/arcana cache``` Opens the Compendium GUI for browsing and retrieving Arcana Items and ingredients. * ```/arcana reload``` Reloads the Arcana Novum configuration and refreshes recipes. * ```/arcana blocks ``` Lists all of a specified player's placed Arcana Blocks. * ```/arcana uuids ``` Lists all Arcana Items in a player's inventory with their unique IDs, and flags any duplicates. * ```/arcana infuse []``` Infuses the held item to the specified enhancement percentage (0-100). Use 0 to strip enhancements. * ```/arcana xp add [points|levels]``` Adds Arcana XP points or levels to the selected players. * ```/arcana xp set [points|levels]``` Sets the Arcana XP points or levels for the selected players. * ```/arcana xp query ``` Queries a player's current Arcana Level and XP. * ```/arcana skillpoints add ``` Adds skill points to the selected players. * ```/arcana skillpoints set ``` Sets the skill points for the selected players. * ```/arcana skillpoints query ``` Queries a player's current skill points. * ```/arcana achievement grant ``` Grants an achievement to the selected players. * ```/arcana achievement revoke ``` Revokes an achievement from the selected players. * ```/arcana achievement query ``` Queries whether a player has a specific achievement. * ```/arcana research grant ``` Grants research for an Arcana Item to the selected players. * ```/arcana research revoke ``` Revokes research for an Arcana Item from the selected players. * ```/arcana research query ``` Queries whether a player has researched a specific Arcana Item. * ```/arcana augment apply []``` Applies an Augment at the specified level to the held Arcana Item. Cannot downgrade existing augments. * ```/arcana augment setlevel []``` Sets an Augment to the specified level for a player. Use level 0 to remove. * ```/arcana changeCrafter crafted|synthesized|earned|found``` Changes the crafter tag on the held Arcana Item to the specified player and acquisition type. * ```/arcana changeSkin ``` Changes the cosmetic skin on the held Arcana Item to an unlocked skin, or "none" to reset to default. * ```/arcana boss start dragon``` Starts the Dragon Boss fight. * ```/arcana boss resetAbilities ``` Resets the boss's ability cycle. Set doAbility to true to immediately trigger a new ability. * ```/arcana boss forceLairAction``` Forces the boss to perform a lair action. * ```/arcana boss abort``` Aborts the current boss fight. * ```/arcana boss clean``` Cleans up any lingering entities or effects from a boss fight. * ```/arcana boss status``` Displays the current status of the active boss fight. * ```/arcana boss forcePlayerCount ``` Overrides the player count used for boss difficulty scaling. * ```/arcana boss announce ``` Announces an upcoming boss fight to all players with a specified time message. * ```/arcana boss begin``` Begins the boss fight encounter. * ```/arcana boss teleport ``` Teleports a specific player to the boss fight arena. * ```/arcana boss teleport all``` Teleports all players to the boss fight arena. * ```/arcana specialEvent check ``` Checks whether a player meets the conditions for a special event. * ```/arcana specialEvent trigger gaialtus``` Triggers the Gaialtus special event for the selected players. * ```/arcana specialEvent trigger ceptyus``` Triggers the Ceptyus special event for the selected players. * ```/arcana specialEvent trigger zeraiya``` Triggers the Zeraiya special event for the selected players. ### Admin Configuration Commands All configuration values can be viewed and changed with `/arcana config [value]`. Omitting the value will display the current setting. Changes take effect immediately and are persisted across restarts. See the [GitHub](https://github.com/borisshoes/ArcanaNovum/releases/tag/v4.0.0%2B1.21.11) for more details. ### Permission Nodes Arcana Novum uses the [Fabric Permissions API](https://github.com/lucko/fabric-permissions-api) for command permissions. Each node has a fallback vanilla permission level for servers without a permissions mod. See the [GitHub](https://github.com/borisshoes/ArcanaNovum/releases/tag/v4.0.0%2B1.21.11) for more details. ### LICENSE NOTICE By using this project in any form, you hereby give your "express assent" for the terms of the license of this project, and acknowledge that I, BorisShoes, have fulfilled my obligation under the license to "make a reasonable effort under the circumstances to obtain the express assent of recipients to the terms of this License.
